decision-tree.root-question: How many tools and how many loop steps?

branch.conclusion: No framework — use the provider SDK directly.
Score Anthropic Agent SDK / OpenAI Agents / LangGraph on the 3 axes.
Score LangGraph / CrewAI / AutoGen on the 3 axes.
Score LangGraph / Anthropic Agent SDK based on deployment target.

example.p: No framework — use the provider SDK directly.
